ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mining_iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining iteration */,
  "total_wait" REAL /* Total wait time for the iteration */,
  "t_place_gold" REAL /* Total gold placed in the iteration */,
  "t_forage_gold" REAL /* Total gold foraged in the iteration */,
  "itt_gold_finish" INTEGER /* Iteration count for gold finish */,
  "t_place_rock" REAL /* Total rock placed in the iteration */,
  "t_forage_rock" REAL /* Total rock foraged in the iteration */,
  "itt_rock_finish" INTEGER /* Iteration count for rock finish */,
  "mine_site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining site associated with the iteration */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining method used in the iteration */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the iteration */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the iteration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mining_iterations_mine_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("mine_site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mining_iterations_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES mining_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mining_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the mining site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for site management */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the mining site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the mining site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the mining site */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the mining site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, engineer, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt value for password hashing */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "iteration_count" INTEGER /* Total number of iterations included in the report */,
  "total_gold_mined" REAL /* Total amount of gold mined */,
  "total_rock_mined" REAL /* Total amount of rock mined */,
  "average_wait_time" REAL /* Average wait time across iterations */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining site associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_iterations" INTEGER /* Total number of iterations in the report */,
  "average_extraction_rate" REAL /* Average extraction rate of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., excavator, drill) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was purchased */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining site where the equipment is used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mining_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining method (e.g., surface mining, underground mining) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mining method */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the mining method (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety incident */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the incident occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the safety incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of safety incident (e.g., injury, equipment failure) */,
  "injured_persons" INTEGER /* Number of persons injured in the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_incidents_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the training session (e.g., safety protocols, equipment handling) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the training session in hours */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Trainer responsible for the session */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining site where the training took place */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic of the training session */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees in the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining site receiving the resources */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource allocated (e.g., fuel, materials) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation was made */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation was requested */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocation_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled next maintenance date for the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance report this analysis is based on */,
  "gold_extraction_rate" REAL /* Rate of gold extraction from the mining process */,
  "rock_extraction_rate" REAL /* Rate of rock extraction from the mining process */,
  "average_wait_time" REAL /* Average wait time during the mining process */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., predictive, descriptive) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES performance_reports ("report_id")
)
